title: koniga rupestris
intro: Koniga rupestris, also known as the Rock Poppy or Mountain Poppy, is a flowering plant species in the Papaveraceae family, characterized by its showy, delicate flowers and unique growth habits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Koniga rupestris include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Koniga rupestris is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
